# ToolContext.SetCacheHints method

Marks this tool's result as cacheable with the given hints (spec §13).

```csharp
public void SetCacheHints(long ttlMs, CacheScope scope)
```

| parameter | description |
| --- | --- |
| ttlMs | The client-cache TTL in milliseconds (minimum 0). |
| scope | The cache sharing scope. |
